headline: $100 Crude Hammered Industrial Stocks — Should You Buy The Dip?
summary: The Industrial Select Sector SPDR ETF fell 10% in March — the worst month since September 2022. Here's what happened the other 11 times, and which stocks got hit hardest.

headline: A Look At Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) has been under pressure recently, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months. That setback now has many investors reassessing the building materials supplier. See our latest analysis for Builders FirstSource. At around US$78.85, the recent 7 day share price return of a 6.86% decline and 30 day share price return of a 24.39% decline sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of a 36.89% loss, suggesting momentum has cooled...
